name: cfrp-shm-platform
description: CFRP Structural Health Monitoring — MERN + Python ML Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.train: cd backend && python src/simulate.py && python src/train_classifier.py && python src/train_regressor.py
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run train
